prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-4IN1EMERGMULTITOOL-AMZ Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 Hand Crank Emergency Flashlight Alarm Siren for Camping Gear Survival Kits Description: Be ready for any situation with this 4 in 1 Emergency Hand Crank Flashlight and Siren from ASR Outdoor, your all-in-one survival tool for light and power. Whether you’re preparing for a power outage, camping off grid, or building an emergency kit, this compact device ensures you stay safe, connected and informed.

Equipped with a bright LED flashlight and a built-in 750mAh rechargeable battery, it delivers up to 15 hours of reliable light on a single charge. Multiple charging options - including USB-C fast charging and a hand-crank generator—make it easy to stay powered anywhere. Just one minute of cranking gives you 5 minutes of light or 1 minute of emergency siren use.

This versatile device also works as a portable charging device, featuring a USB-A output to charge smartphones and small electronics when outlets aren’t available.

Compact and lightweight at just 5" x 2-1/4", the two-tone gray and black design easily fits into emergency kits, bug-out bags, backpacks or glove compartments. With its built in emergency siren, intuitive controls, and durable construction, this survival flashlight is a must have emergency preparedness item.

Stay prepared, stay safe, and stay connected with the ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 Emergency Multitool, a must-have for every outdoor enthusiast. Search Terms: Camping hunting survival gear; emergency preparedness items; flashlight; extreme weather; bug out bag; survival kits; car emergency kit; earthquake emergency kit; charging tool; multitool; camping essentials; hand crank emergency light Features: - VERSATILE FLASHLIGHT: Reliable emergency crank flashlight delivers up to 15 hours of bright light on a single charge, ideal for blackout preparedness, to include with camping gear, survival kits and much more - RECHARGEABLE BATTERY: 750 mAh capacity fully recharges in just 4 hours and powers up to 15 hours of flashlight use - MULTIPLE CHARGING OPTIONS: Stay powered anywhere with USB-C charging (cable included) or hand-crank generator; 1 minute of cranking provides 5 minutes of light or 1 minute of emergency alarm - ON THE GO POWER: Doubles as a portable charger with USB-A output to keep smartphones and small devices powered when outlets aren’t available - EMERGENCY SIREN: Built in alarm allows you to alert others or call for help in urgent situations === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
